zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Heiton於1341年出生在英國藍卡爾希頓時，他的父親John de Heaton II43歲，母親Margaret Huyton41歲。他於1358年與Isolda Billinge在英國英格蘭藍卡爾比林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1385年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾甸尼享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heiton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of North German Heuten: patronymic from a short form of an ancient Germanic compound name with the element hod ‘custody, shield, hood’.
History: The progenitors of the Heutons were Meint (Mike) Heuten and his brothers, who in 1868 moved from East Frisia, Germany, to the US.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Heiton was born in 1341, in Heaton, Lancashire, England, his father, John de Heaton II, was 43 and his mother, Margaret Huyton, was 41. He married Isolda Billinge in 1358, in Billinge, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1385, in Deane, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

ko.Christ Church, Heaton, Metropolitan boro: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 히턴 크리스트 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Heiton(이)가 1341년 영국 랭카실르 히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Heaton II(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Huyton(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 빌링에서 Isolda Billinge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 디인에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Heiton родился в 1341 г. в местности хитон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Heaton II было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Huyton, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Isolda Billinge в 1358 г. в местности биллинг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1385 г. в местности дин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.
